name: Can't-Fail Fudge
recipeInstructions: To keep this never-fail fudge glossy and smooth-looking, do not overbeat and avoid touching the pan after pouring into it until it is completely set. Combine marshmallows, milk, butter, sugar, and salt in a saucepan. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil. Boil for 5 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and add chocolate pieces, beating until melted. Do not overbeat. Fold in vanilla extract and nuts. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan. Chill until firm. Makes about 2 1/2 pounds.
